basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 1 Project Associate-I post. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E. in Chemical/Materials/Bio/Mechanical Engineering or related fields, or M.Sc. in Physics/Chemistry/Biology or related fields.
qualification.details: B.Tech/B.E. in Chemical/Materials/Bio/Mechanical Engineering or related fields, or M.Sc. in Physics/Chemistry/Biology or related fields. The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Project Associate-I position at IIT Gandhinagar is 12th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.Tech/B.E. in Chemical/Materials/Bio/Mechanical Engineering or related fields, or an M.Sc. in Physics/Chemistry/Biology or related fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I position is 28 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 45,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate-I position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this job?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official IIT Gandhinagar website.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job, not a permanent government position.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What are the minimum academic percentage requirements?
faq.answer: A minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th are required.
